name: Extended Scientific
victoryScreenHeader: Complete project orion by adding Orion parts, Complete martian program by colonizing mars, BUILD A GENERATIONAL SHIP AND SEND IT SOMEWHERE LIKE ANDROMEDA IDK
victoryString: you won ! that's it. you somehow sent humans to andromeda
defeatString: You have been defeated. Your civilization has been overwhelmed by its many foes. But your people do not despair, for they know that one day you shall return - and lead them forward to victory!
